changeSet.author: Liquibase
changeSet.comment:
Upsert function for strategy, handling the full create/edit lifecycle across four tables.
CREATE (p_strategy_id IS NULL): - insert strategy (auto-increment id) - seed a default sub-strategy and a default run - grant access rows for owner + analysts + reviewers EDIT (p_strategy_id provided and exists): - update the strategy row - do NOT re-seed sub-strategy / run (they already exist) - RECONCILE access rows: revoke any active role no longer in the incoming set (handles a role change e.g. Reviewer -> Analyst by revoking the old role row), and insert any newly-required role row. Role changes follow the revoke-old + insert-new rule (never in-place role update).
Returns the resulting strategy row.
